visual_direction: Industrial technical procurement, distinctive from blue-green reference sheets, suitable for B2B network connectivity products.

graphite.role: Primary ink, headers, strong technical identity

deep_teal.role: Module headers, section rules, category labels

copper_amber.role: RFQ emphasis, part-number highlight, commercial action

ice_gray.role: Page background and calm technical surface

risk_red.role: Blocked claims, missing compliance, cannot publish

component_rules.tables: Dense but readable, left label and right value.
component_rules.cta: Copper amber for RFQ and purchase action only.
component_rules.cards: Use only for repeated product facts or evidence blocks.

do_not_use: Leviton brand colors as primary palette
unconfirmed MOQ, price or lead time
